reviews.review_description: This is, effectively, a non-interactive music video. Which is 100% fine. I've seen another review criticizing this title for not being a game--a totally worthless critique. I love seeing innovative uses of VR, especially when it is used to present music and other art. This particular song is presented in a beautiful manner and the team who created it did a fine job. I'm unfamiliar with the artist but the singer's voice is really good with lots of "texture" and interesting phrasing. Although the genre of music isn't in my wheelhouse, I enjoyed the song. The visuals provide a beautiful, retro synthwave atmosphere. I'm taking time to review this primarily because it currently has middling reviews which I find grossly inaccurate or unfair, most likely posted by children who have no idea what this actually is (i.e. a music video). It's free, it's a good song with a talented vocalist, and the retro visuals present everything in an impactful manner. It's FREE so just check it out. To the music & visual artists behind this project: great job and kudos for taking the chance to present your art in VR.
BRO IT'S JUST A SONG NO GAME AT ALL
